FAQ.title: Pricing Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Straight answers about how our pricing works.

items.q: Do prices change after we agree?
items.a: No. The price we quote in the discovery call is fixed. We only revise if the scope changes significantly — and we always tell you before doing any extra work.

items.q: What's the difference between setup price and monthly maintenance?
items.a: Setup is a one-time fee to build and deploy your solution. Monthly maintenance is optional — it covers hosting costs, minor updates, and priority support. You can cancel anytime.

items.q: Do you offer a free trial?
items.a: Yes — AI Agent clients get a 1–2 week free trial before committing to maintenance. Consulting and development projects don't have trials, but always start with a free 30-minute discovery call.
For larger projects (above ৳20,000), we typically take 50% upfront and 50% on delivery. Custom arrangements can be discussed during the discovery call.

items.q: Do international clients pay in USD?
items.a: Yes. International clients pay in USD via Wise or PayPal. Bangladeshi clients pay in BDT via bKash, Nagad, or bank transfer.

CTA.title: Not sure which plan fits?
CTA.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. We'll understand your business and tell you exactly what you need — no sales pressure, no commitment.
